mapper.select: select dept_id from sys_role_data_scope where role_id = #{roleId} and db_status = 1
select t2.dept_id from sys_user_role t1, sys_role_data_scope t2 where t1.user_id = #{userId} and t1.role_id = t2.role_id and t1.db_status = 1 and t2.db_status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_data_scope (role_id, dept_id, db_status, creator, create_time, tenant_id) VALUES
(#{item.roleId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.dbStatus}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{tenantId})
